# DealWithIt Realty

> DealWithIt Realty is a real estate company specializing in RERA-approved residential and commercial plot investments in Dholera SIR (Special Investment Region), Gujarat, India.

## Projects
- [RSC Pride](https://dealwithit.org.in/rsc-pride): RERA-approved plot investment project in Dholera SIR.
- [Aerox](https://dealwithit.org.in/aerox): RERA-approved plot investment project in Dholera SIR.
- [Elanza](https://dealwithit.org.in/elanza): RERA-approved plot investment project in Dholera SIR.

## Dholera SIR Investment Guide
- [About Dholera SIR](https://dealwithit.org.in/dholera-sir): Overview of Dholera SIR infrastructure, growth drivers, and investment potential.

## Contact
Website: https://dealwithit.org.in
